subcodes.title: Words to Mr Kinney, spoken around 1909-07-11
subcodes.first_line: Among the nations of the world there is darkness of religion. Darkness due to hostility and animosity is intense.
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @unity in diversity, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
